text: The surgeon demonstrates robotic wrist articulation by manipulating a ring along a metal pipe. The right hand is pronated with a straight grasper when grabbing the ring, supinated over horizontal or upper curves, pronated while moving upwards, and supinated while moving downwards.

The second ring is maneuvered along the metal pipe using robotic wrist articulation, with the hand pronated while moving upwards, supinated around curves, and alternating between pronation and supination to complete the course.
